## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run --with pytest pytest -q`
- [ ] Relevant `ralphite check` gate(s) executed

## Documentation Checklist

- [ ] Updated relevant docs for changed behavior/contracts
- [ ] Updated docs references/examples if CLI/schema/runtime defaults changed
- [ ] Added/updated ADR under `docs/decisions/` if architecture/runtime contract changed

## Risk Notes

List key risks and rollback approach.
